source: Group chat member list + intros (Feb 20), web research (Feb 21)

yc_founders_current_batch.name: Christian Pickett
yc_founders_current_batch.what: Agentic payments for APIs — unified MCP/SDK for paid API access, pay-as-you-go
yc_founders_current_batch.background: Previously: payments at Coinbase, billing at Vercel. Co-founder Bera Sogut (Google reCAPTCHA/Maps, 2x ICPC World Finals finalist). Met at McGill.

yc_founders_current_batch.name: Deepit Shah
yc_founders_current_batch.what: Pre-launch (X26 not started yet). Previously founded MindFort AI (YC X25 — autonomous security agents) and Bluejay (YC X25 — QA for voice AI, $100K ARR quickly)
yc_founders_current_batch.background: University of Illinois. Active in YC ecosystem with 2 prior YC companies.

yc_founders_current_batch.name: Kazuma Choji
yc_founders_current_batch.background: ML at Pololu Robotics and Electronics. Published research on visual question answering (COREVQA). Computer vision / ML research.

yc_founders_current_batch.name: Isabela Rodriguez
yc_founders_current_batch.background: University of the Andes (Colombia), Endeavor network, sales leadership. Based in SF.

yc_founders_current_batch.name: Tony Montes
yc_founders_current_batch.background: NLP/GenAI specialist. Founding AI Engineer at Domu (YC S24) — built production voice-AI for end-to-end customer calls.

yc_founders_current_batch.name: Pragya Saboo
yc_founders_current_batch.background: Georgia Tech. Principal at Climate Capital, led Time Tracking launch at Asana, built Virtual Care at Oscar Health, co-founded Aara Health (DTC nutraceuticals).

yc_founders_current_batch.name: Spandana Govindgari
yc_founders_current_batch.background: Cornell CS. Staff Engineering Lead at Meta (payments across Instagram/WhatsApp/FB Shops — billions in TPV). Founding female engineer on Snapchat Payments. Previously Apple. Founded Hype AR (TechCrunch/Forbes, patented).

yc_founders_current_batch.name: Sardor Rahmatulloev
yc_founders_current_batch.what: Training data for agricultural robotics — wearable cameras on farm workers, POV footage for robotics training
yc_founders_current_batch.background: First Uzbek founder accepted into YC. Cornell (Combat Robotics, startup incubator). Previously Meta Superintelligence. Serial founder, 6-figure+ revenue from prior startup.

competition_threats.name: Vir Sanghavi
competition_threats.title: CTO
competition_threats.notes: Won 3rd at YC Agent Jam'25 (youngest team, 10% acceptance rate). NASA Space Apps Challenge #1. Building logic markets and prediction platforms. MCP experience. National NSDA Congressional Debate Finalist (2023, 2024). Only 15 years old.

competition_threats.name: Arnav Dewan
competition_threats.notes: Won 8 hackathons (CalHacks, Solana, YC, Google Gemini). Full stack engineer, agentic AI focus. GitHub: arnxv0 (46+ repos). Projects: deepfake-detector, venU-app.

competition_threats.name: Vansh Gadhia
competition_threats.notes: Stanford EECS. VP of Hackspace at BASES (Stanford entrepreneurial org). RISE Global Winner 2023 (Schmidt Futures + Rhodes Trust). Won TreeHacks prize. From Dubai.

competition_threats.name: Ged Ossman
competition_threats.title: Founder & CEO
competition_threats.notes: SIMILAR SPACE — operations intelligence, agent self-onboarding for enterprise. Ex-founding engineer copper.co (crypto custody, through Series C). Forbes Technology Council member. Senior Executive AI Think Tank. Piloted with Crunchbase and Copper.co.

competition_threats.name: Joey Koh
competition_threats.notes: 24 wins out of 34 hackathons (later 41 total). 18 wins with strangers, 3 solo wins. Stanford (x2), Yale, MIT (x4) wins. Most Impactful Hacker Award (individual, 467 participants). Once won sponsor prize completing project in 4 hours out of 24. AI & Product Engineer at SimConverse.

high_value_networking.name: Chase Brignac
high_value_networking.background: YC S22 alumnus (Craze). Previously: Amazon AGI, Apple, NASA, Target. From Cancer Alley, Louisiana. Founded ChatOpenSource (open-source ChatGPT alternative). MIT AI Conference speaker.
high_value_networking.why: YC alumnus, ex-FAANG (Amazon AGI + Apple + NASA), running stealth AI company

high_value_networking.name: Vatsal Trivedi
high_value_networking.title: Founder
high_value_networking.background: Head of AI at Dirac (1M+ geometries, 70% latency reduction, saved $300K/yr). ML at Meta (50M+ users). SWE at Microsoft (Windows 11 Store). CTO at Stax. Capital One. Georgia Tech.
high_value_networking.why: Enterprise AI founder, deep production ML experience, potential customer/partner

high_value_networking.name: Chris Leggett
high_value_networking.title: CTO
high_value_networking.background: Gen AI & language intelligence. Ex-Meta, ex-Scale AI. Building ReasonOS — distributed OS for software businesses (monitoring, CI/CD, security, scaling in one AI system) + reasoning orchestration layer.
high_value_networking.why: FAANG network (Meta, Scale AI), building in adjacent AI infrastructure space

high_value_networking.name: Miguel Castellano
high_value_networking.background: Physics (Sorbonne), PhD ETH Zurich/MIT. Quantitative Finance.

high_value_networking.name: Nicolo Tognoni
high_value_networking.background: Senior SWE, autonomous event-driven systems, has mcp-use experience

high_value_networking.name: Nitin Bhat
high_value_networking.background: Senior AI Engineer at CVS Health. Voice AI, health agents, MCP.

high_value_networking.name: Parth Nandaniya
high_value_networking.background: SWE at YC-backed startup. AI agents focus.

high_value_networking.name: Henry Wang
high_value_networking.background: SWE at Sixtyfour — 'Bloomberg Terminal for sales'. AI research agents for people/company intelligence. UC Riverside. Early team member/collaborator with CEO Saarth Shah.

high_value_networking.name: Rini Khandelwal
high_value_networking.background: SWE at Nixo — ops platform for forward-deployed engineers. Note: Nixo founders are Priya Khandelwal (CEO, Stanford CS) and Priti Rangnekar (CTO, Cornell CS, ex-Meta).
